BTC Tops $77K on Peace Developments, Ethereum Up, XRP Follows | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][4]

Bitcoin has surged past $77,000 today amid reports of de-escalating geopolitical tensions (referred to as "peace"), driving broad crypto gains with Ethereum rising 2.70% to around $2,217 (INR equivalent) and XRP advancing 2.52% [1][4].
